creator: jesusr@voztele.com
text:
Hello,


> The following reply was made to PR ports/128939; it has been noted  
> by GNATS.
>
> From: Christer Solskogen <christer.solskogen@umoecom.no>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org,
> christer.solskogen@gmail.com
> Cc:
> Subject: Re: ports/128939: net/openser buildable on amd64
> Date: Wed, 19 Nov 2008 10:31:22 +0100
>
> tlsops.so is not installed on i386 either (occurs if you enable tls in
> config)
> snmpstats.so is also not installed if you enable snmpstats.


Thanks for the reports.

I have to do more changes as openser does not exists anymore and now  
we have two different projects: kamailio and opensips... and a third  
one sip-router.org in a near future.

I will fix the problems for all the (new) ports.

Regards.

Saludos
JesusR.
